summary: Iteration 14 - Critical bug fixes verification. All 7 test items passed: Login returns session_config, password reset email sends successfully, SITE_URL is production domain, all 4 game files accessible, order success page works, admin 2FA setup shows 'Continue without 2FA' link, Instructor Toolbox shows all 4 offline game files.
critical_code_review_comments: auth_routes_v2.py: Lines 996-1014 - login response correctly includes session_config with timeout_mins, role, message
auth_routes_v2.py: Lines 1174-1206 - password reset uses correct send_email() params (to= not to_email=)
email_service.py: Lines 29-38 - SITE_URL correctly defaults to https://kingdom-soul.com via get_site_url()
TwoFactorSetup.js: Lines 157-167 - 'Continue without 2FA' link visible for admin/instructor roles
InstructorToolbox.js: Lines 424-461 - offlineGameFiles array correctly defines all 4 files
InstructorToolbox.js: Lines 463-541 - renderGamePacks() renders download cards with correct file URLs
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical bug fixes verified. Login flow works: credentials -> 2FA setup page -> 'Continue without 2FA' link available for admin. Instructor Toolbox accessible after login with all 4 offline game files displayed.

login_session_config.details: POST /api/auth/login returns session_config object with timeout_mins, role, message keys

password_reset_email.details: POST /api/auth/forgot-password returns 200 OK, backend logs show 'Email sent successfully: Soul Food - Password Reset'

site_url_production.details: SITE_URL env var is 'https://kingdom-soul.com', not preview URL

game_files_accessible.details: All 4 files return HTTP 200: ie-grinch-bingo-game-pk.pdf, ie-grinch-bingo-card-pk.pdf, ie-passport-trek-game.pdf, map-journey-reference-index.docx

order_success_page.details: /order-success?order=TEST-FAKE-ORDER shows 'No downloads found' message, not redirected to homepage

admin_2fa_skip_link.details: After admin login, redirected to /2fa-setup with visible 'Continue without 2FA' link

instructor_toolbox_game_files.details: Instructor Toolbox shows 'Offline Game Files' card with 4 Files badge, all 4 files displayed with Download buttons

mocked_apis.none: All integrations are live (Resend email, MongoDB, Stripe)
